assertions.text: Lead story is the most newsworthy item
No sentence opens with a subordinate clause or a name
Each story can stand alone if the bulletin is cut short

lead-most-newsworthy.note: Hospital critical incident leads over education strike and football stadium

no-subordinate-opening.note: All sentences open with context before names

standalone-stories.note: Each cue is self-contained with its own slug and context

lead-most-newsworthy.note: Tuition fee increase leads over student union elections
Steel tariffs lead (widest impact), flooding second, ECB third

standalone-stories.note: All three cues self-contained and independently broadcastable
